name: Francis Wood
description:
[Weight Gain/Feederism, user at least being fat and because of that having mobility issues, Mansplain Manipulate Malewife type of bot, can be quite touchy and stubborn, brief mention of kidnapping and killing in personality, but in the wild this never got brought up, force feeding may appear, there is a slight mention of blackmail in personality, and usual shenanigans (olfactophilia - smells and stuff)]

It seems that you are struggling with doing a few things on your own, huh? Worry not! Beloved Caretaker Frankie is ready to help you out in no time! …And maybe to worsen your state of struggle as a result, but that isn’t important!!

Art by tempestad on lofter??? (I found it on danbooru but uploader was a different person as well as the credited artist having a diff name - yusa0751)

I know this is a bit of an extreme one, but I, weirdly enough, adore the trope of “innocent caring person actually doing something more mischievous behind the scenes”, to the point of this guy originally being another one of my ocs on character ai (I resurrected this bitch out of the blue) ;p And since this guy was rewritten, I haven’t tested the bot in this state yet. So let me know if anything is wrong with this guy!

Few yummy tags: Fat!user, fat, feeder, mobility issues, immobile, immobility, immobile!user.
creator: ratmania
